SELECT RS_NAME, RS_URI FROM DB.DBA.SYS_RDF_SCHEMA WHERE RS_URI LIKE 'http://example.com/%';
SELECT RS_NAME FROM DB.DBA.SYS_RDF_SCHEMA WHERE RS_NAME IN ('test_rule_set', 'another_rule_set') AND RS_URI IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DB.DBA.SYS_RDF_SCHEMA WHERE RS_G IS NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT RS_NAME FROM DB.DBA.SYS_RDF_SCHEMA WHERE RS_NAME NOT IN ('virtrdf-ifp', 'virtrdf-label');
RDFS_RULE_SET ('boundary_test_set', (SELECT ?s ?p FROM DB.DBA.SYS_RDF_SCHEMA WHERE RS_NAME = 'test_rule_set' LIMIT 1));
RDFS_RULE_SET ('composite_rule_set', (SELECT ?g FROM DB.DBA.SYS_RDF_SCHEMA WHERE RS_NAME LIKE 'test%'));
RDFS_RULE_SET ('multi_table_rule_set', (SELECT a.RS_NAME FROM DB.DBA.SYS_RDF_SCHEMA a JOIN DB.DBA.SYS_RDF_SCHEMA b ON a.RS_NAME = b.RS_NAME WHERE a.RS_URI != b.RS_URI));
